---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
data <- read.csv("C:/Users/kokeshem/Spring 2026/Advanced Data Analysis/BIOS6624/Project2/DataRaw/PrelimData.csv")

cor(data$CVLT_CNG3, data$IL_6, use = "complete.obs")
cor(data$CVLT_CNG3, data$MCP_1, use = "complete.obs")
cor(data$CORT_CNG3, data$IL_6, use = "complete.obs")
cor(data$CORT_CNG3, data$MCP_1, use = "complete.obs")

#created range for correlations for power analysis
r_range <- c(0.26, 0.32, 0.60)
r_labels <- c("conservative", "moderate", "optimistic")
```
#Aim 1 Power Calculations:
```{r}
library(powertools)

#alpha levels
alpha_unadj <- 0.05
alpha_aim1  <- 0.05 / 48   #conservative correction across all planned Aim 1 tests

#Omnibus regression models from preliminary data
fit_cvlt <- lm(CVLT_CNG3 ~ IL_6 + MCP_1, data = data)
fit_cort <- lm(CORT_CNG3 ~ IL_6 + MCP_1, data = data)
summary(fit_cvlt)
summary(fit_cort)

Rsq_cvlt <- summary(fit_cvlt)$r.squared
Rsq_cort <- summary(fit_cort)$r.squared

#pairwise correlations from preliminary data
rho_cvlt_il6  <- abs(cor(data$CVLT_CNG3,  data$IL_6,   use = "complete.obs"))
rho_cvlt_mcp1 <- abs(cor(data$CVLT_CNG3,  data$MCP_1,  use = "complete.obs"))
rho_cort_il6  <- abs(cor(data$CORT_CNG3,  data$IL_6,   use = "complete.obs"))
rho_cort_mcp1 <- abs(cor(data$CORT_CNG3,  data$MCP_1,  use = "complete.obs"))

data.frame(
  quantity = c(
    "Rsq_cvlt",
    "Rsq_cort",
    "rho_cvlt_il6",
    "rho_cvlt_mcp1",
    "rho_cort_il6",
    "rho_cort_mcp1"
  ),
  value = c(
    Rsq_cvlt,
    Rsq_cort,
    rho_cvlt_il6,
    rho_cvlt_mcp1,
    rho_cort_il6,
    rho_cort_mcp1
  )
)

#planned final sample sized, predictors for mlrF.overall test
N_final <- 175
p_omnibus <- 2


#power at N = 175
pw_cvlt_u <- mlrF.overall(N = N_final, p = p_omnibus, Rsq = Rsq_cvlt, alpha = alpha_unadj, power = NULL)
pw_cvlt_a <- mlrF.overall(N = N_final, p = p_omnibus, Rsq = Rsq_cvlt, alpha = alpha_aim1,  power = NULL)

pw_cort_u <- mlrF.overall(N = N_final, p = p_omnibus, Rsq = Rsq_cort, alpha = alpha_unadj, power = NULL)
pw_cort_a <- mlrF.overall(N = N_final, p = p_omnibus, Rsq = Rsq_cort, alpha = alpha_aim1,  power = NULL)

#N needed for 80% power
n_cvlt_80 <- mlrF.overall(N = NULL, p = p_omnibus, Rsq = Rsq_cvlt, alpha = alpha_unadj, power = 0.80)
n_cort_80 <- mlrF.overall(N = NULL, p = p_omnibus, Rsq = Rsq_cort, alpha = alpha_unadj, power = 0.80)

aim1_omnibus_summary <- data.frame(
  outcome_family = c("Memory (CVLT_CNG3)", "Imaging (CORT_CNG3)"),
  Rsq = c(Rsq_cvlt, Rsq_cort),
  power_alpha_0_05 = c(pw_cvlt_u, pw_cort_u),
  power_alpha_0_05_over_48 = c(pw_cvlt_a, pw_cort_a),
  N_for_80pct_power = c(n_cvlt_80, n_cort_80)
)

aim1_omnibus_summary


```
